<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Decoders; use Intervention\Image\Exceptions\DecoderException; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ColorInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; class FilePointerImageDecoder extends BinaryImageDecoder { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see DecoderInterface::decode() */ public function decode(mixed $input): ImageInterface|ColorInterface { if (!is_resource($input) || !in_array(get_resource_type($input), ['file', 'stream'])) { throw new DecoderException('Unable to decode input'); } $contents = ''; @rewind($input); while (!feof($input)) { $contents .= fread($input, 1024); } return parent::decode($contents); } }
